Tests the subtraction of two Number objects in JavaScript to ensure the result is zero.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the subtraction operation between two `Number` objects in JavaScript. It verifies that subtracting one `Number` object with a value of `1` from another `Number` object with the same value results in `0`. This test ensures that the JavaScript engine correctly handles arithmetic operations involving `Number` objects, which are object wrappers for primitive numeric values. The use of `assert` indicates that the code is intended to validate expected behavior, likely as part of a broader test suite.
